99%+ Purity, Guaranteed

Every compound is verified to 99%+ purity by HPLC and mass spectrometry, and ships with its own Certificate of Analysis. If a batch doesn't meet spec, it never ships — that's our guarantee, in writing, on every order.

COA Certified

We don't grade our own work. Every batch is sent to an independent, third-party laboratory and ships with its own Certificate of Analysis — identity and purity verified by HPLC and mass spectrometry, confirmed by people with no stake in the outcome.

Canadian, Shipped in 24 Hours

Proudly Canadian, and Canada-only. Orders ship from within Canada within 24 hours, in CAD, with no customs seizures or border delays. Real people reply fast and go above and beyond on every order — premium, white-glove service.

Research-grade peptides, blends and laboratory supplies. Every compound is supplied strictly for in-vitro and laboratory research use only.
